title: Basic TB vs UVM map check

items.prompt: Classic “pin wiggle in initial” maps most directly to UVM…
items.explain: The driver consumes items and drives pins through a virtual interface.

items.prompt: Hard-coded vectors / nested tasks map to…
items.explain: Sequences express scenario intent; the sequencer feeds the driver.

choices: Scoreboard predict vs actual on transactions
items.explain: Scoreboards compare expected vs observed at transaction level.

items.prompt: UVM eliminates the need for stimulus, observation, and checking.
items.explain: UVM reorganizes the same jobs—it does not remove verification work.
